metadata.title: S&P 500 Compensation Peer Group Network
metadata.description: Directional peer group relationships from SEC EDGAR DEF 14A proxy statements
sources: 467 DEF 14A proxy statements from S&P 500 companies
metadata.methodology: Company-disclosed compensation peer groups from CD&A sections. Each directed edge = source selected target as a benchmarking peer.

nodes.name: Bank of New York Mellon Corp/The
